meta.compiled_by: Web research via Claude (claude.ai) — every entry sourced from a live public page as of compile date
meta.important: verification_status is 'unverified' for ALL entries. Verdicts (Green/Red) must be assigned by a human after reviewing the license text and the org's own compliance posture. Do NOT auto-mark pathways as verified on import.
meta.community_funds_added: 2026-07-05 — 4 community/individually organized funds added (accreditation noted per entry)
meta.link_audit: 2026-07-11 — every donation URL scraped and verified; 11 entries re-pointed from generic org homepages to Venezuela-specific campaign pages (aid-for-life also moved to the correct domain aidforlifeintl.org; wfp-food routes via WFP's ShareTheMeal Venezuela campaign; airlink-logistics via its official Donorbox campaign)

funding_sources.name_en: Fund for the Recovery and Reconstruction of Venezuela
funding_sources.name_es: Fondo para la Recuperación y Reconstrucción de Venezuela
funding_sources.org: CAF — Development Bank of Latin America and the Caribbean
funding_sources.amount_notes: Up to $200M target; $1M non-reimbursable seed from CAF plus prior $300K emergency donation. UN estimates total reconstruction bill ~$6.7B.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Projects identified and prioritized by the Government of Venezuela; executed via eligible implementing entities or directly by CAF
funding_sources.compliance_notes: No management fees; resources segregated from CAF balance sheet; independent external audit; AML checks on donors; contributions in USD or EUR. Transfer reference required: 'Fondo para la Recuperación y Reconstrucción de Venezuela – [contributor name]'; receipt copy to alianzas@caf.com and trustfunds@caf.com.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — relief-phase activities may fall under GL 60 (expires 2026-10-23); reconstruction-phase contributions by US persons need separate analysis. Fund channels to GoV-prioritized projects, which is the key compliance question.
funding_sources.notes_es: Fondo multidonante de hasta USD 200 millones administrado por CAF, sin comisiones, con auditoría independiente. Recursos dirigidos a proyectos priorizados por el Gobierno de Venezuela.

funding_sources.name_en: Venezuela Humanitarian Fund (UN OCHA country-based pooled fund)
funding_sources.name_es: Fondo Humanitario para Venezuela (OCHA)
funding_sources.amount_notes: Open pooled fund; accepts public donations via UN Crisis Relief.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Dozens of vetted local NGOs and frontline responders in Venezuela — one of the few channels where LOCAL Venezuelan NGOs can receive allocations
funding_sources.compliance_notes: UN-administered; donations via crisisrelief.un.org; bank transfer/check via crisisrelief@un.org.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — UN-channel giving generally low-friction for US persons; confirm against GL 60 and pre-existing humanitarian authorizations.
funding_sources.notes_es: Fondo mancomunado de la ONU que canaliza recursos a ONG locales y socios de primera línea en Venezuela. Uno de los pocos canales donde las ONG venezolanas locales pueden recibir asignaciones.

funding_sources.name_en: UNICEF Venezuela Earthquake Emergency Appeal
funding_sources.name_es: Llamamiento de emergencia de UNICEF por los terremotos en Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: $52M earthquake requirement within the wider 2026 Humanitarian Action for Children appeal of $137.6M (only 35% funded pre-quake). $3.5M mobilized from UNICEF internal emergency funds.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: UNICEF operations: health, nutrition, WASH, child protection, education; target 650,000 people incl. 234,000 children
funding_sources.compliance_notes: US donors can give via UNICEF USA (tax-deductible).
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — established UN agency; standard humanitarian authorizations expected to apply.
funding_sources.notes_es: UNICEF requiere USD 52 millones para la emergencia sísmica, dentro de su llamamiento 2026 de USD 137,6 millones. Meta: 650.000 personas, incluidos 234.000 niños.

funding_sources.name_en: PAHO/WHO Venezuela Earthquakes Donor Appeal
funding_sources.name_es: Llamamiento de la OPS/OMS por los terremotos en Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: $23.9M appeal covering six months of health emergency response.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Lifesaving health interventions and continuity of essential health services
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Primarily institutional-donor oriented.
funding_sources.notes_es: La OPS lanzó un llamamiento de USD 23,9 millones para seis meses de respuesta sanitaria de emergencia.

funding_sources.name_en: IFRC Emergency Appeal — Venezuela Earthquake
funding_sources.name_es: Llamamiento de emergencia de la FICR — Terremoto de Venezuela
funding_sources.org: International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies / Venezuelan Red Cross
funding_sources.amount_notes: CHF 50M appeal (~USD equivalent varies; store CHF 50M as canonical) to assist 300,000 people; CHF 2M released from IFRC-DREF within hours of the disaster.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Venezuelan Red Cross response: search and rescue, first aid, health network support, family links
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Bilateral example: Ireland contributed €1M to IFRC for this response.
funding_sources.notes_es: Llamamiento de CHF 50 millones para asistir a 300.000 personas a través de la Cruz Roja Venezolana; CHF 2 millones liberados del fondo DREF.

funding_sources.name_en: DEC Venezuela Earthquake Appeal (UK)
funding_sources.name_es: Llamamiento DEC por el terremoto de Venezuela (Reino Unido)
funding_sources.org: Disasters Emergency Committee (15 UK charities incl. Oxfam, IRC UK, Save the Children UK, British Red Cross, CAFOD, Christian Aid)
funding_sources.amount_notes: Over £7M raised in first day (store GBP as canonical); UK Government matching public donations up to £2M via UK Aid Match.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: 14 of 15 DEC member charities responding in Venezuela with local partners
funding_sources.compliance_notes: UK-jurisdiction giving channel; UK Aid Match doubles impact up to cap.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: N/A for US persons (UK channel); note for UK-based diaspora.
funding_sources.notes_es: Coalición de 15 ONG británicas; más de £7 millones recaudados el primer día, con contrapartida del gobierno británico de hasta £2 millones.

funding_sources.name_en: EU Humanitarian Aid (ECHO) — Venezuela earthquake emergency funding
funding_sources.name_es: Ayuda humanitaria de la UE (ECHO) — financiamiento de emergencia
funding_sources.amount_notes: €5M emergency release post-quake, on top of €52M allocated to Venezuela in 2026; €577M total since 2016. Store EUR as canonical.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Channelled solely through humanitarian partners: UN agencies and international NGOs working with local partners — INGOs with ECHO framework partnership can access
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Not a public donation channel; relevant as a funding source NGOs can pursue.
funding_sources.notes_es: €5 millones de emergencia liberados tras los sismos, además de €52 millones asignados en 2026. Canalizado exclusivamente a través de agencias de la ONU y ONG internacionales socias.

funding_sources.name_en: Venezuela IMF Special Drawing Rights — reconstruction access
funding_sources.name_es: Derechos Especiales de Giro del FMI — acceso para reconstrucción
funding_sources.amount_notes: Venezuela aims to initially access $200M of its $4.5B in SDR holdings for reconstruction (Bloomberg, citing people familiar; details not public).
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Government-led reconstruction
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Sovereign channel — include for capital-stack completeness, flag as reported/unconfirmed.
funding_sources.notes_es: Venezuela busca acceder inicialmente a USD 200 millones de sus USD 4.500 millones en DEG del FMI para la reconstrucción (reportado, no confirmado oficialmente).

funding_sources.name_en: GiveDirectly Venezuela Earthquake Cash Relief
funding_sources.name_es: Ayuda en efectivo de GiveDirectly por el terremoto
funding_sources.amount_notes: Scoping cash response; targets hundreds of families initially, scalable with funding. Historically delivers cash 2-3 weeks post-disaster.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Unconditional digital cash transfers to affected families, selected via damage and poverty data
funding_sources.compliance_notes: GiveDirectly explicitly cites GL 60 as the authorization enabling it to move funds into Venezuela. US tax-deductible (EIN 27-1661997). Accepts card, ACH, PayPal, DAF, wire, stock, crypto.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: GL 60 — org itself cites this license publicly. Still verify scope before marking Green.
funding_sources.notes_es: Transferencias de efectivo directas y sin condiciones a familias afectadas. La organización cita públicamente la Licencia General 60 como habilitante para mover fondos a Venezuela.

funding_sources.name_en: Global Empowerment Mission + I Love Venezuela earthquake response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta de Global Empowerment Mission + I Love Venezuela
funding_sources.org: Global Empowerment Mission (Doral, FL) with I Love Venezuela / We Love Foundation
funding_sources.amount_notes: Initial $35M commitment in humanitarian aid and support; U.S. State Department partnership (with Walmart) for supply delivery; corporate in-kind (e.g., Goya 100,000 lbs food).
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Emergency logistics, supplies to hospitals and local NGOs, transition to long-term recovery incl. housing and schools
funding_sources.compliance_notes: The flagship diaspora-institutional bridge: Miami collection points, coordination with municipalities, faith orgs, and Venezuelan diaspora groups.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — US-based 501(c)(3) operating under GL 60 window presumed; verify.
funding_sources.notes_es: Compromiso inicial de USD 35 millones; alianza con el Departamento de Estado de EE.UU. y Walmart. Principal puente entre la diáspora de Miami y la respuesta institucional.

funding_sources.name_en: GlobalGiving Venezuela Earthquake Relief Fund
funding_sources.name_es: Fondo de Ayuda de GlobalGiving por el Terremoto de Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: Pooled fund regranting to vetted local organizations.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Local organizations — flexible, rapid funding for emergency medical care, SAR support, shelter, food, water, hygiene. KEY entry point for Venezuelan local NGOs seeking funding.
funding_sources.compliance_notes: GlobalGiving performs its own partner vetting.
funding_sources.notes_es: Fondo que reotorga subvenciones flexibles y rápidas a organizaciones locales — punto de entrada clave para ONG venezolanas que buscan financiamiento.

funding_sources.name_en: Center for Disaster Philanthropy — Venezuela recovery grants
funding_sources.name_es: Center for Disaster Philanthropy — subvenciones de recuperación
funding_sources.amount_notes: Focus on medium- to long-term recovery via partners — money arrives after the media cycle ends.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Partner organizations for medium/long-term recovery
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Relevant for NGOs planning beyond the GL 60 window.
funding_sources.notes_es: Enfocado en recuperación de mediano y largo plazo a través de socios — financiamiento que llega después del ciclo mediático.

funding_sources.name_en: International Rescue Committee Venezuela response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta del International Rescue Committee
funding_sources.amount_notes: Donation-match campaign active; in Venezuela since 2021.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Health, nutrition, WASH, protection, food security services
funding_sources.notes_es: Servicios de salud, nutrición, agua y saneamiento, protección y seguridad alimentaria; presente en Venezuela desde 2021.

funding_sources.name_en: Catholic Relief Services via Caritas Venezuela
funding_sources.name_es: Catholic Relief Services a través de Cáritas Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: One of the State Department's three named partner organizations (with Samaritan's Purse and World Vision).
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Emergency food, water, shelter via long-standing Caritas Venezuela network
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Caritas network gives deep local parish-level reach.
funding_sources.notes_es: Alimentos, agua y refugio de emergencia a través de la red de Cáritas Venezuela; socio nombrado por el Departamento de Estado de EE.UU.

funding_sources.name_en: World Central Kitchen Venezuela response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta de World Central Kitchen
funding_sources.amount_notes: Announced initial $1M donation; working with longtime in-country partners on meals and water.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Hot meals and water in disaster zones via local partners
funding_sources.notes_es: Donación inicial de USD 1 millón; comidas calientes y agua a través de socios locales de larga data.

funding_sources.name_en: Direct Relief — emergency medical aid
funding_sources.name_es: Direct Relief — ayuda médica de emergencia
funding_sources.amount_notes: Medicines for acute injuries plus chronic disease medications for disrupted routine care; responds to healthcare partner requests.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Medical aid to healthcare partners in Venezuela
funding_sources.notes_es: Medicamentos para lesiones agudas y enfermedades crónicas, entregados a socios de salud en Venezuela.

funding_sources.name_en: Americares — medical aid and relief supplies
funding_sources.name_es: Americares — ayuda médica y suministros
funding_sources.amount_notes: Medicines, antibiotics, water purification, orthopedic supplies, hygiene kits; coordinating with PAHO and OCHA.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Medical aid to hardest-hit areas
funding_sources.notes_es: Medicinas, antibióticos, purificación de agua y kits de higiene; coordina con la OPS y OCHA.

funding_sources.name_en: Samaritan's Purse — Emergency Field Hospital deployment
funding_sources.name_es: Samaritan's Purse — hospital de campaña de emergencia
funding_sources.amount_notes: Airlifting Emergency Field Hospital, shelter tarps, solar lights, blankets, water filters. State Department named partner.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Field hospital operations and shelter supplies
funding_sources.notes_es: Hospital de campaña aerotransportado y suministros de refugio; socio nombrado por el Departamento de Estado.

funding_sources.name_en: Alimenta la Solidaridad — local emergency support
funding_sources.name_es: Alimenta la Solidaridad — apoyo local de emergencia
funding_sources.amount_notes: Venezuelan NGO providing food, water, equipment, and medical supplies to victims and first responders.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Direct local operations
funding_sources.compliance_notes: One of the few named LOCAL orgs on GoFundMe's verified hub — model example of grassroots-to-compliant-channel routing.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — local recipient; the compliance question for foreign donors is the payment channel.
funding_sources.notes_es: ONG venezolana que provee alimentos, agua, equipos y suministros médicos a víctimas y rescatistas. Ejemplo de canal local verificado.

funding_sources.name_en: Aid for Life earthquake relief fund
funding_sources.name_es: Fondo de ayuda de Aid for Life
funding_sources.amount_notes: Founded 2018 for Venezuela crisis; on-ground team procures per requests from local orgs incl. UCV student rescuers, hospitals, clinics.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Direct procurement and distribution via in-country team and local partners
funding_sources.notes_es: Fundada en 2018 para la emergencia venezolana; equipo en terreno compra según pedidos de organizaciones locales, hospitales y clínicas.

funding_sources.name_en: Hispanic Federation Venezuela relief
funding_sources.name_es: Ayuda de Hispanic Federation para Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: Working with partner organizations on food, water, and emergency shelter access.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Partner organizations serving affected communities
funding_sources.notes_es: Trabaja con organizaciones socias para acceso a alimentos, agua y refugio de emergencia.

funding_sources.name_en: GoFundMe verified Venezuela earthquake fundraisers hub
funding_sources.name_es: Centro de campañas verificadas de GoFundMe
funding_sources.amount_notes: Platform-level hub; each listed fundraiser passes enhanced Trust & Safety due diligence including compliance with evolving regulations and payment-partner policies.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Individual verified fundraisers (families, communities) + featured org campaigns (WCK, WFP)
funding_sources.compliance_notes: IMPORTANT: link to the HUB, not individual campaigns — GoFundMe's own vetting does the trust work, keeping curation liability at the platform level. GoFundMe explicitly flags that diaspora direct-transfer fundraisers must comply with international law and payment-partner rules.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: Platform handles vetting; the Navigator's role is routing + the money-movement guidance layer for organizers.
funding_sources.notes_es: Cada campaña listada pasa por debida diligencia reforzada de GoFundMe. Enlazar al centro verificado, no a campañas individuales.

funding_sources.name_en: Airlink — airlift support for responding NGOs
funding_sources.name_es: Airlink — transporte aéreo para ONG
funding_sources.amount_notes: Donated and low-cost airlift for 20+ nonprofit partners moving responders and supplies to Venezuela.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Air transport for nonprofit responders — an in-kind resource NGOs can APPLY for
funding_sources.notes_es: Transporte aéreo donado o de bajo costo para más de 20 ONG — recurso en especie que las organizaciones pueden solicitar.

funding_sources.name_en: World Food Programme Venezuela earthquake food assistance
funding_sources.name_es: Asistencia alimentaria del PMA
funding_sources.amount_notes: Expanding food assistance — hot meals and ready-to-eat rations, mainly La Guaira; 5,000 people reached in first week. Featured on GoFundMe hub.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Food assistance in support of government-led response
funding_sources.notes_es: Comidas calientes y raciones listas para consumir, principalmente en La Guaira.

funding_sources.name_en: Cuatro Por Venezuela Foundation earthquake response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta al terremoto de Cuatro Por Venezuela Foundation
funding_sources.amount_notes: Founded 2016 by four Venezuelan women in Houston; delivers medical supplies, food and education programs through partner networks inside Venezuela.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Medical supplies, nutrition and education programs delivered via vetted partner networks inside Venezuela
funding_sources.compliance_notes: US 501(c)(3), EIN 81-4622309. Charity Navigator Four-Star charity, 95% score.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — US-person donations for earthquake relief may fall under GL 60 (expires 2026-10-23); confirm before contributing.
funding_sources.notes_es: Fundada en 2016 por cuatro mujeres venezolanas en Houston. 501(c)(3) con calificación Cuatro Estrellas (95%) de Charity Navigator. Entrega insumos médicos, alimentos y programas educativos mediante redes de aliados dentro de Venezuela.

funding_sources.name_en: Healing Venezuela earthquake medical response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta médica al terremoto de Healing Venezuela
funding_sources.amount_notes: Started 2014-2016 by a small group of Venezuelans living in the UK; raising funds for medical supplies for first responders and hospitals after the 2026 earthquakes.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Medical supplies and equipment shipped to first responders and hospitals in affected areas; medical staff support
funding_sources.compliance_notes: UK registered charity no. 1170709 (Charity Commission for England & Wales); also registered as a US 501(c)(3). Member of the UK Fundraising Regulator directory.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — UK charity; US-person donations for earthquake relief may fall under GL 60 (expires 2026-10-23).
funding_sources.notes_es: Organización benéfica registrada en el Reino Unido (n.º 1170709) y como 501(c)(3) en EE. UU., creada por venezolanos en Londres. Recauda fondos para insumos médicos destinados a socorristas y hospitales tras los terremotos de 2026.

funding_sources.name_en: Chamos earthquake emergency response
funding_sources.name_es: Respuesta de emergencia al terremoto de Chamos
funding_sources.amount_notes: Venezuelan diaspora charity with 19+ years on the ground; activated within hours of the June 24 quakes — LifeStraw water filters, baby formula, therapeutic food, medicines, hygiene kits; rebuilding damaged schools and community spaces.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Water filtration, child nutrition, medicines and hygiene kits for children and families; assessment and reconstruction of damaged schools
funding_sources.compliance_notes: UK-registered Venezuelan diaspora charity. Earthquake project hosted and vetted on GlobalGiving (partner due-diligence applies).
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — donations for earthquake relief may fall under GL 60 (expires 2026-10-23); school reconstruction phase needs separate analysis.
funding_sources.notes_es: Organización de la diáspora venezolana registrada en el Reino Unido, con más de 19 años en terreno. Activó su respuesta a horas de los sismos: filtros de agua, fórmula infantil, alimentos terapéuticos, medicinas y kits de higiene; además reconstruye escuelas dañadas. Proyecto verificado en GlobalGiving.

funding_sources.name_en: Un Dólar Por Venezuela — $1 community campaign
funding_sources.name_es: Un Dólar Por Venezuela — campaña comunitaria de $1
funding_sources.amount_notes: Grassroots micro-donation campaign: states 100% of each dollar collected goes directly to three verified non-profits actively responding to the earthquake.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: Regranted in full to three verified non-profit organizations responding to the earthquake
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Community-organized regranting campaign; the named recipient non-profits carry their own accreditation. Confirm the current recipient list on the campaign page before giving.
funding_sources.suggested_license_pathway: REVIEW — pass-through to US non-profits; end-use should fall under GL 60 (expires 2026-10-23) but verify recipients.
funding_sources.notes_es: Campaña comunitaria de microdonaciones: declara que el 100% de cada dólar va directamente a tres organizaciones sin fines de lucro verificadas que responden al terremoto. Confirme la lista de receptores en la página antes de donar.

funding_sources.name_en: OCHA Revised Response Plan (forthcoming)
funding_sources.name_es: Plan de Respuesta Revisado de OCHA (próximo)
funding_sources.amount_notes: Rapid Needs Assessment underway to inform a revised response plan launching the week of July 6, 2026. Expect a consolidated funding requirement — the single most important upcoming number for the Navigator.
funding_sources.funds_go_to: TBD — will define sector requirements and partner allocations
funding_sources.compliance_notes: Track FTS for the appeal code once launched; auto-update Capital Stack from FTS API.
funding_sources.notes_es: Plan de respuesta revisado se lanza la semana del 6 de julio — la cifra consolidada más importante por venir. Monitorear FTS.
